description:
100% Plant for All Cuisines, All Diets.
Nutritious, Affordable & Sustainable for a Deliciously Better Future. 
(Made in Singapore)

Meat is one of the highest consumables globally & brings about unsustainable issues that include food safety, expensive prices, environmental degradation & animal rights amongst many more. 

Gathering experiences in food technology, sustainability & culinary skills, THOUGHTFUL’s humble approach is by providing a delicious, unique & localized plant-based meat alternative solution. Through direct engagement & education, THOUGHTFUL aims to inspire people to think differently about quality protein sources & move towards more conscious, sustainable ways of eating, one plant-based meal at a time.

THOUGHTFUL PLANT-MEAT DRY MIXES: CHICKEN, BEEF, PROTEIN & PRAWN

Why dry? Staying dry allows our products to be minimally processed while retaining the maximum nutritional benefits for our consumers. Ranking high for protein quality backed by PDCAAS reports, THOUGHTFUL is “25% lower in saturated fat & sodium compared to regular plant-based meat alternatives” offered in the current market (HPB Singapore). With all necessary essential fatty & amino acids the body needs to grow, stay strong & healthy, THOUGHTFUL is an ideal product to provide the perfect protein!

Long shelf life is guaranteed, promising zero food waste. No refrigeration or freezing needed for transportation also means unbeatable end-to-end cost efficiency for chefs, caterers & end-users while ensuring lower carbon emission. 

Once reconstituted, THOUGHTFUL has a texture just like ground meat which can be used as a meat substitute in soups, stews, sauces, burgers, stir-fries, gyozas, meatballs, etc. With no added artificial seasonings or additives, THOUGHTFUL can be spiced & seasoned to suit all dietary requirements, all cuisines. 

DM us for collaboration!

description:

Our major products include Kapton tapes, Teflon products, polyester tapes, masking tapes, surface protection tapes, cloth tapes, reinforced paper gum, rubber based OPP, and high end specialty tapes.

We recognize the impact of sustainability and our range of recyclable and biodegradable paper tapes are made of FSC Certified Material. 

Our services include slitting, rewinding, die cut and printed tapes, labels and stickers. 

We invest in the latest technology and our machines can precision slit and rewind to any width and length.

We serve a wide range of industries and our customers range from startups to SMEs, MNCs and Fortune 500 companies.  

Our reputation stands on our traditional values of Trustworthiness, Truthfulness, Teachability and Teamwork.

It is our mission is to provide innovative solutions that create positive user experience.

And it is our vision to be the industry partner of choice for adhesive tapes and surface protection solutions.

Contact us at marketing@heleflo.com.sg for your sticky solution now.

description:
Fire Terminator International is a Singapore-based manufacturer and provider of innovative fire fighting solutions. We specialize in developing green, non-toxic, and PFAS-free fire suppression products for all classes of fires, including forest fires. With a strong commitment to environmental sustainability and safety, we offer cutting-edge solutions that prioritize both effective fire control and ecological responsibility.
Green Fire Suppression Solutions: We have developed a range of environmentally friendly fire suppression agents that are highly effective in extinguishing fires while minimizing harm to the environment. Our solutions are free from PFAS (Per- and Polyfluoroalkyl Substances) and other toxic chemicals, making them safe for use in a variety of settings.

company_name: Orca - At the top of your food chain
description:
Since 2009, Orca Marketing has been Singapore’s premier partner for premium meat and seafood solutions. Born from deep roots in the seafood trade and nurtured through a passion for uncompromising quality, we serve as the reliable supply chain link between the world’s best protein producers and Singapore’s top kitchens.

We specialise in sourcing, processing, and delivering chilled, live, and frozen meat and seafood from trusted origins, including Australia, New Zealand, Japan, and beyond. Over time, we have expanded into beef, lamb, pork, and deli products, growing our portfolio to meet the evolving needs of the foodservice sector.

Our portfolio includes some of the world’s most respected producers, from Blackmore and Stone Axe Wagyu to Little Joe, Portoro, Gooralie Free Range Pork, Kinross Station Lamb, Akaroa King Salmon, Fremantle Octopus, Yarra Valley Caviar, and more. These partnerships ensure every cut and catch reflects the highest standards of quality, sustainability, and provenance.

Through our integrated butchery facility in Senoko, we provide custom processing, SFA-licensing compliance, and same-day delivery across Singapore, ensuring precision, consistency, and speed for our clients.

Our retail arm, Butcher Box, brings these premium proteins directly to consumers while supporting F&B customers through wholesale solutions, all backed by Orca’s robust supply chain, storage, and distribution infrastructure.

If you’re a chef, purchasing manager, or hotel GM seeking a dependable partner with supply certainty, premium sourcing, and personalised service, connect with us. Let’s build a relationship that gives your kitchen access to the finest ingredients, delivered with the consistency and care your menu deserves.

description:

description:
Our team behind the Spirit Vault Collective holds the same passion and ambition you have in investing and collecting, and we're looking forward to having like-minded individuals joining the Collective. In 2019 Knight Frank released their first investment index that specifically mentioned whisky as an asset class to be taken seriously, which further underlined our conviction in this space.  In 2020, rare whisky topped the Knight Frank index again, rising in value by 564% in the last ten years.

As drinkers and investors of whisky over the past +15 years, we are pleased to offer our clients access to this exciting asset class for the future.  We work with experienced traders, investors and distributors across the globe, have a deep knowledge of premium distilleries and brands in the market, and have existing supplier relationships within the industry.  Our founder’s personal portfolio has achieved +350% returns over the first 5 years, which we aim to replicate for our investors through Spirit Vault Collective.

Spirit Vault Collective is a structured investment vehicle based in Singapore. We trade in premium, rare and collectible whiskies to maximise pricing returns. Our inventory is held in one of 3 locations in Scotland, Singapore or South Africa which ensures that our valuation is always supported by underlying physical assets.

We hold a diverse portfolio across multiple brands and distilleries to protect against downside risks and are able to buy or sell whisky rapidly through existing distribution channels. This enables us to maintain an optimal portfolio providing the highest possible returns for our investors.

SVC Holdings Pte Ltd officially opened as a local trading company in August 2018 and began active purchasing of whisky with founder’s equity in the same month. On 1st April 2019, we opened our doors to external investors.

description:
Kewpie Singapore Pte Ltd was formerly known as Minato Singapore Pte Ltd. Kewpie Singapore was established in October 2020 as a sales office.

Kewpie’s Long-Lasting Legacy Of Great Taste, Empathy, And Uniqueness
Since 1925, it has been Kewpie’s corporate belief that enhancing the quality of food takes more than just transcending flavours, but it takes the mindset and the drive to prioritise the importance of maintaining great health for everyone in the family. Kewpie Group’s goal is to continually contribute to the world’s food culture and health through great taste, empathy, and uniqueness. Both executives and employees work faithfully to provide special, choice goods and services in order to earn our customers’ trust. With that, everybody at Kewpie is proud to have inherited the beliefs of Toichiro Nakashima, the founder of Kewpie Corporation, with regard to how job motivation comes from enjoying work with people who have the same ambitions and rejoicing together in this mission.

Putting Quality First
Ensuring food safety and great taste, enabling consumers to lead fulfilling, healthy lives through food is of vital importance to our mission. As a group, we all adhere to the “Quality First” principle in our work. We strive for personnel development to ensure high quality systems that underpin the Company’s quality, and the pursuit of technologies that enhance quality.

description:
HCS VISION

HCS is a leading distributor of scientific products and aims to provide the widest range of consumables, equipment and chemical reagents to users in Singapore and SEA region. Our market segments include manufacturers in the Petrochemical & Pharmaceutical industries, Food & Chemical industries, Testing & R&D Labs, Universities & Polytechnics and Government Departments. With the development of HCS OEM business from renowned manufacturers, we strive to increase our competitive advantage among market players. We are confident in providing effective solutions with value-added high quality services to be the One-Stop Process & Lab Solution Provider for our most valued users, OUR CUSTOMERS. 

HCS MISSION

To support the advancement in science & technology by constant expansion of product range to meet ever-changing needs. Together with HCS dedicated customer service team, we aim to provide value-added solutions to achieve customer satisfaction and consistently exceed their expectation. We strongly believe the importance of building a trustworthy business relationship with all our partners.

HCS CORE VALUES

HUMANITY

We believe in providing Human Touch in all our partnerships with our customers and suppliers. We strive to provide a beneficial and favorable working relationships with all our partners.

COMMUNICATION

We believe that the dynamics of strong and lasting relationship is Communications. We pledge to stay Connected to all our customers and suppliers by providing the best solutions and feedbacks. We are Committed to our business in upholding our values and responsibilities for all partners.

SCALABILITY

Due to the constant changes in our market environment and technology landscape, HCS has to stay Flexible in order to handle more challenging businesses. With our upgraded ERP System, we created new opportunities for all our partners to develop, expand and adapt to new challenges.

description:
In pursuit of being a dedicated nutritional supplements manufacturer, Singapore Pharmatech specializes in OEM and ODM services, delivering safe and high-quality nutritional supplements within a minimal lead time. We aim to create a core competency for your brand and business. We are comprehensively equipped with automated production and packing lines, minimizing the risk of cross-contamination and ensuring exceptional quality assurance. Additionally, Singapore PharmaTech strictly adheres to the quality standards set by Singapore's government authority, the Health Science Authority's Guidelines (HSA). This ensures that all our products meet the requirements for heavy metal and microbial content before they are delivered to your hands. With our professional team's capabilities, Singapore PharmaTech provides a total solution service for OEM private labeling and ODM services. We assist with ingredient selections, product concept development, and packaging design. Offering high quality, better efficacy, an affordable MOQ, and shorter lead time, we aim to be your long-term business partner!

For any inquiries, please email us at ENQUIRY@SGPHARMATECH.COM

description:
At Catering Solutions, we set the standard in the way food is created and delivered.

Since 1996, our name has been synonymous with high quality, fresh and affordable meals. Equipped with advanced food technology and machinery to automate food processing without compromising on quality and taste, our highly skilled employees and motivated management team have been catering halal bento box meals for workers, executives and students of various institutions in Singapore and Malaysia.

From gourmet cuisines reserved for corporate clients and foreign dignitaries, to everyday comfort food that delight the palates of the masses, we have the competencies to offer them all. We also design customized menus to cater to every institution’s needs and tastes and are able to offer reliable catering of any scale.

Hailing from Singapore, Malaysia, India, China, Bangladesh and the UK, our skilled chefs leverage on their diversity to create authentic ethnic fares such as Chinese, Bangladeshi, Malay, Indian and vegetarian cuisines. All cuisines delivered by us are carefully curated to cater to the varied nutritional requirements of local and foreign workers, executives and students. Each day, we prepare and serve up to 15,000 meals in Singapore and 4,500 meals in Malaysia.

What do we ultimately offer? Fresh meals that bring comfort and warmth and nourish not only the body but the soul. Quality meals that are prepared with great care to suit the individual dietary needs of the end consumer. And most importantly flavorful meals that bring back memories of home to our consumers.

description:
For hundreds of years, X has been the go-to symbol for the unknown in mathematical equations and expresses our desire here at Asian Beauty X, to help you unravel the complexities and mysteries behind modern beauty products and regimes.

We understand that every individual’s beauty needs are unique and the best product for your skin may not be readily available where you live. Yet shopping online for Asian beauty products can be daunting at times with information not available or ingredients list in a foreign language. That is why here at Asian Beauty X, we strive to provide you with whatever necessary for you to make an informed decision.

description:
Who We Are
Bring together experienced individuals from the ingredient business, a challenging mission and an excellent proprietary product – and there you have the foundation of Prorika.

Operating in Europe, Prorika’s focus product comes from its own source. We serve all food industry players who see alternative protein as key to a sustainable food system that reduces climate impact and boosts profits.

What We Do
The basis of our offering is nutritious, quality plant based protein, alongside a multitude of environmental advantages. Legumes like soy and peas require little water and enrich the soil by fixing atmospheric nitrogen, benefiting regenerative farming.

Why We Do It
It is an undeniable fact that plant proteins account for half the climate impact compared to animal proteins, and that protein is one of the three macronutrients that human beings need to nourish themselves. Therefore, we find it encouraging to witness the rising demand for sustainable protein-rich alternatives that can both supplement and replace traditional protein sources, resulting in a more sustainable business model – improving the planet, people and profit.

The Mission
But – it is not enough to rely on high sustainability benefits with low impact. We must work to do more.

Therefore, our simple mission is to increase plant-based protein consumption for a sustainable planet and a healthier you.

Join us on our journey.

description:

company_name: Eiffel Markets, French wine importer & distributor
description:
Eiffel Markets is a french wine importer and distributor based in Singapore. We are focusing on family owned vineyards, human size, who elaborate wines from the grapes growing on their lands, in respect of the tradition, environment and consumers.

Most of our wines are certified organic or biodynamic, they are pure, clean, fruity and easy to drink, they truly represent the typicity and diversity of the french terroirs without all the agrochemicals, oenological additives, and technological processes used in commercial brands. 

We guarantee the origin of all our wines, imported directly from the wineries in France, shipped and stored in refrigerated containers to make sure they reach you in perfect condition. 

We have great value for money wines from Alsace, Bordeaux, Burgundy, Champagne, Loire Valley, Rhone Valley, Languedoc and Provence to choose from.

All our wines are available on our website at wholesale prices : https://eiffelmarkets.com

The delivery is free above $200, Monday to Friday, we can do mixed case (1bt+1bt+1bt...). We launch a new promotion every month to promote a particular estate, wine region or grape variety. We also propose a monthly subscription for 6 bottles at $239/month (save $300/year), pay as you go and cancel anytime. 

Last but not least, we organize wine tasting & wine dinner regularly, follow us on social media to check when is the next one: www.facebook.com/eiffelmarkets

Thank you very much for your support, we look forward to hearing from you soon!
Eiffel Markets Team

description:
Previously Natron International in Singapore we have been acquired & now rebranded as MacLean International Group, part of the DNOW group of companies.  
In Singapore we are a seasoned team of professionals specialising in the supply of industrial & hazardous area electrical, lighting, cabling, cable solutions & valves.  We have a proven industry track record with an unwavering commitment to timely, cost effective & superior product delivery.
Utilising state-of-the-art systems & equipment we manage the provision of a reliable & efficient service for our customers.  Whatever the project size or location we can optimise supply chain management by helping to reduce supplier numbers, speed order processing & ease materials management. As a trusted & reliable partner, we provide assistance with material specification, product application, sourcing, manufacturer bid evaluation, procurement, certification, documentation, translation, inspection, packing & logistics & materials management.

MACLEAN INTERNATIONAL GROUP
A multiple commodity global business, we are world class specialists in the global supply & management of electrical products, lighting systems & cables, valves, PPE & safety, OEM drilling consumables, MRO & tooling for harsh & hazardous environments in onshore, offshore & renewable energy, petrochemical, process, marine, industrial, data centre & infrastructure applications.
Established in 1974, we have grown to become a single experienced source for all these materials.  Our business units throughout the UK together with our operations in Australia, the Middle East, Singapore & parent company DNOW network in Europe & around the world, gives us a truly global footprint.
We are an approachable & transparent company with an enviable track record of serving the world's energy & infrastructure operators, developers & their contractors.  Our customers are Priority 1 & we encourage customer feedback to monitor our performance, shape our service and reward our teams

description:
Established in 1957 by Mr Tan Kim Pheow, Kim Hing Company processes and sells Chinese delicacies such as bird’s nests, shark’s fins and other traditional health products. With the advancement in food technology in the 1960s, Kim Hing Company ventured into food processing, focusing on the preparation of bird’s nests. Kim Hing Company set up its first retail outlet in Peninsula Shopping Centre.

Increasing competition in the bird’s nest processing industry in the 1980’s spurred Kim Hing Company to invest heavily in research and development to stay in the forefront of the market. These investments enabled Kim Hing Company to successfully develop the World’s first glass-bottled bird’s nest in 1986. Advanced processing equipment and manufacturing processes were adopted - products were hermetically sealed with vacuum technology and hygienically sterilized by a heat treatment process.

The result was a ready-to-eat bird’s nest product with prolonged shelf life which retains the original flavours and nutrients of traditionally prepared bird’s nest. This innovation cemented Kim Hing Company’s position as the pioneer in this industry.

The Kim Hing Group consists of:
Kim Hing Company
Kim Hing Investments Pte Ltd
Kim Hing Food Industries Pte Ltd
Dragon Brand Birds Nest Pte Ltd

description:
Welcome to Kiwi Kitchen! We take pride in being a leading provider of New Zealand products to the residents of Singapore and Kiwis living here. As a family-run business founded in 2014, we are passionate about bringing the finest selection of authentic New Zealand groceries right to your doorstep.

At Kiwi Kitchen, we understand the importance of quality and authenticity. That's why we curate a wide range of products sourced directly from New Zealand's renowned producers and brands. From mouthwatering dairy products, gluten-free products, and premium meats to flavorful sauces, condiments, and more, our online store offers a taste of New Zealand that you can enjoy in the comfort of your own home.

We strive to create a seamless and convenient shopping experience for our customers. Our user-friendly website allows you to browse through our extensive product category, make secure online payments, and have your groceries delivered promptly to your doorstep. With our commitment to exceptional customer service, we aim to exceed your expectations every step of the way.

Whether you're a Kiwi missing the flavors of home or a Singapore resident with a taste for the finest New Zealand products, Kiwi Kitchen is here to serve you. Join our community of satisfied customers and experience the convenience and joy of discovering authentic New Zealand cuisine without leaving Singapore.

Connect with us on LinkedIn to stay updated on our latest product offerings, promotions, and news. We look forward to serving you and becoming your go-to online grocery store for all things New Zealand.

description:
Established in 2017, OTTER Group is a tech-driven, fast-growing pizza and dessert chain operator with locations in Singapore and Malaysia.

Currently, we operate over 30 quick-service retail stores under the brands 'Otter Pizza' and 'Ji De Chi' island-wide, as well as an 8,200 sq ft state-of-the-art factory. Our factory has the capacity to manufacture a diverse range of finished and semi-finished food products, supplying not only our self-operated outlets but also external customers in the HoReCa industry.

Our corporate office is located at 71 Ubi Road 1, Oxley Bizhub, Singapore, with a shared services centre in Johor Bahru.

Otter Pizza

Conceived in 2019, Otter Pizza aims to provide a wide variety of quality pizza options at affordable prices to Singaporeans in heartland areas.

Leveraging our expertise in supply chain management and the high efficiency achieved through centralized operations, we believe that quality can be affordable. At Otter Pizza, we position ourselves as a "Neighbourhood Pizzeria" that welcomes repeat visits from families, friends, couples, and more, making our delicious offerings a part of their everyday lives.

description:
Soyami started when I was running ActiveFun, originally to serve healthy snacks to children. I did the R & D in my own kitchen and came up with nutritious and good-tasting soya chips. My son helped brainstorm on what was to be the soya chips brand, Soyami—from soya and yummy.

Soyami chips have gained a strong reputation for being a healthy snack option, especially among snack chips lovers of any age. A healthy alternative to chips that are considered junk food and an option to fruits and nuts as healthy snack fare, Soyami Chips now enjoy the distinction of being the country’s first and only real soya-based snack.

More recently Soyami expanded its product line to include 11 flavors of delicious soya-based ice cream available in Soyami Ice Cream cart that are scene stealers at Festival Supermall. Now, both young and old can enjoy great tasting and nutritious ice cream without fear of ingesting so much sugar. Soyami ice cream is zero dairy, zero cream, zero eggs, zero cholesterol and low in fat. 

 Key Achievements
- Developed the Soyami brand and market positioning
- Developed the go-to market strategy
- Set up a plant and production crew to manufacture and distribute the snacks
- Managed institutional sales and distribution channels
- Soyami has expanded and is available in different product ranges, flavours and is distributed throughout Supermarkets and Health Food Stores in the Philippines and Middle East

 Opportunities
- Seeking to grow distribution channels and partners for Soyami throughout South East Asia
- Seeking retailers, resellers, distributors, institutions who would like to sell Soyami products
- Seeking franchisees for Soyami Ice Cream carts
- Available for customising flavors for restaurants, hotels and retail stores

 More Information
www.amsoyami.com
www.facebook.com/soyami.soyachips

 Contact
sales@amsoyami.com

description:
Haolight Private Limited is a comprehensive international trading company based in Singapore, specializing in the food and consumer products sector. The company is dedicated to innovative product development and boasts several well-known brands and product lines, including Justice hair care products, Tongfa instant rice, ShooLoongKan product line, Slington bear paw bread, and Adaciao rice noodles. Haolight not only emphasizes product quality and consumer needs but also continuously expands its business footprint through overseas projects.



The company is actively positioning itself globally, particularly through canteen projects and automatic vending machine initiatives that facilitate quicker market entry for its products. The vending machine projects enable consumers to conveniently purchase Haolight's offerings, further enhancing market penetration and brand influence. Haolight's goal is to provide efficient, healthy, and premium products, striving to become a recognized international brand.

description:
Passionate about Healthy Baking since 2008.

Delcie’s Desserts and Cakes is the first in Singapore to bake and market healthier and diet sensitive cakes. Using mostly nutritious, low-GI, plant-based ingredients, our innovative bakery stands out as a pioneer of delectable desserts and cakes for health-conscious consumers, parents with toddlers and those with diabetes or food allergies.

What makes Delcie's unique is our dedication to creating delicious and nutritious cakes that are egg-free, dairy-free, cane-sugar-free, and baby-friendly. With options like nut-free, gluten-free, G6PD friendly and berries-free, our cakes are naturally cholesterol-free and trans-fat-free, ensuring everyone can enjoy a guilt-free indulgence without sacrificing taste.

Over the years, we have garnered numerous awards and accolades. These recognitions are a testament to our bakery's hard work and commitment to providing excellent quality cakes for customers with specific dietary requirements.

 First bakery in Singapore awarded the Healthier Choice Bakery Partner Certification by the Health Promotion Board since 2011.
 Most recommended Halal Certified Healthy Cakes by parents and school teachers.
 Winner of Most Family Friendly Bakery in 2024.
 Consecutive winner of Best Baby Friendly Cakes in Singapore since 2019.
 Clinically certified Low G.I. diabetic-friendly products since 2019.
 Most Promising Heartland Enterprise Star Award, The Federation of Merchants’ Associations 2021.
 Most Outstanding Specialty Diet Bakery Global Award, Global Business Insight 2021.
 Most Innovative Heartland Enterprise Star Award, The Federation of Merchants’ Associations 2015.
 Top 16 International Vegan Bakery, OneGreenPlanet 2014.
 Top 5 Healthy Chef, TimeOut Singapore 2013.

Delcie’s Desserts and Cakes makes it possible for anyone with a hearty appetite to enjoy cakes and desserts without feeling guilty or sacrificing the taste they love.

description:
Do you often find old wives' tales relating to the seafood that you adore? 
Isn't it difficult to gather accurate details on the seafood products from the wet market stalls or supermarkets?
Fear not! We are here to help you investigate all these rumours and old wives' tales!
We adopt an evidence-based approach to validate claims and debunk fake information related to Seafood.
We share our findings in the hope that more people will be inspired to develop knowledge of the seafood industry.

Our promise to our customer is simply transparency. Whether it's price, food quality, or quantity, we will be honest about it.
You won't have to contend with the trickery and dishonesty of some seafood sellers.
So, let us know if you have some rumours to validate. We will do our utmost to provide evidence-based answers.

description:
Tradition since 1986. Kate’s Catering was once a humble confectionery kitchen that evolved to one of Singapore's prominent food catering companies. We provide Buffet, High Tea, drop off Mini Buffet and Bento / Packed Meals to government agencies, corporations and private individuals.

Kate’s Catering is uniquely popular for providing Breakfast that is available as early as 7am. Start each morning off with freshly brewed coffee and tea with dishes that include our Kate's Mee Siam, Hawker Style Fried Carrotcake, Indian Roti Prata, Croissants, Sandwiches and Freshly Baked Pies.

Certified Halal by MUIS, Kate’s Catering has achieved one of its notable objectives of bringing people together from all walks of life, regardless of race, language or religion.

As a Healthier Choice Caterer approved by the Health Promotion Board of Singapore, Kate’s promotes healthy living with healthy eating. All of our freshly prepared meals are cooked with less salt, less oil and less sugar. Healthier Choice Menus are available for Bento, High Tea and Buffet.

Together with Kate’s dedicated team, we strive to deliver an exceptional client experience in taste, service and quality.

description:
CX OFFICE SYSTEM : The leading office furniture manufacturer in Malaysia
Established in 2000, CX Office System has expanded over the last 15 years to become an unrivalled, one-stop solution for office workspace requirements. CX has strategically positioned itself as a competitive office furniture manufacturer in Malaysia, and expanding its product ranges as well as its sales operation in both Malaysia and Singapore.

Operating from state-of-the-art 70,000 sq ft factory in Ulu Tiram, in the Johor, at the West of Malaysia, CX has worked with some of the largest blue-chip companies in the country, as well as home-based and small to medium sized businesses. Unlike many office furniture suppliers in the market today, we are committed to finding you office furniture that is superior in quality and design, yet is practical and durable, with a one to five years guarantee.

As well as our meticulous attention-to-detail, at CX Office System and Interiors we understand that a successful working environment is dependent upon successful space management, the consideration of practical requirements and the ability to complete a project on time, to budget and the fulfilment of any design or architectural constraints.

Our enterprising and experienced professionals can oversee all aspects of your office refurbishment such as office interiors design, space planning and office furniture, providing advice, visual interpretation of ideas, site surveys and a complete project implementation and management service.

This can include suspended ceilings, office security and telecommunications, office partitioning, painting and decorating, audio visual installation, racking, shelving and storage walls. We also offer bespoke office furniture and office accessories.

So when you need some office furniture and want to see the most comprehensive range, contact us. Welcome any quotation.
Please contact us at Phone: +65 8716 3536 or E-Mail: jun@cxsystem.com.sg

description:
Stamfles Group has over 23 years of institutional catering experience in the food manufacturing and production industry, having served 50,000 meals a day. Innovation is at the core of Stamfles' business, and we are no stranger to transforming our business, in order to adapt to changing trends and preferences of our clients and customers. We take pride in our wealth of experience in various business operations in the food industry, ranging from insitutional catering, food manufacturing and services, restaurant operations, to our newly launched e-commerce platform. At the heart of it all, our aim is feeding happiness, one meal at a time.

About Roost:

Roost is the amalgamation of tradition and innovation, delighting diners with our inventive menu of Local and Asian dishes. Featuring the world’s first automated poultry cooking machine, iKook, Roost harnesses the latest technology to ensure consistency and quality in its products, and prides itself as the Home for Chicken Rice.

About Easy Gourmet:

Easy Gourmet is your trusted provider of halal food such as frozen ready meals and soups in Singapore. Easily prepared in less than 10 minutes, our ready meals are suitable for quick meal fixes in the office or at home. Our experience in food technology gives us the freedom and inspiration to explore new ways to improve the quality and flavours of our meals. Through constant effort and unwavering determination, Easy Gourmet will make eating a better, more convenient and happier experience for everyone, one meal at a time.

Check out our fuss-free ready-to-eat meal options here: https://easygourmet.com.sg

description:
The concept of Chompétit baked treats for pets was conceived by Willem van Kruijsbergen when he founded Bake4Pets in 2015. The baked treats are produced by Diversi Foods, a leading player in the world of bakery from Belgium. These Chompétit healthy and tasty baked muffins, cakes and biscuits for pets, are non-GMO, all-natural and additive-free, and are presented in attractive shapes, and natural colours. 

Headquartered in Belgium with production plants in Belgium, Netherlands, France, Germany, UK and Poland, Diversi Foods specialises in authentic recipes and traditional production methods. You can find baguettes, breads, rolls, buns, snacks, pizzas, crumbles and patisserie, produced by Diversi Foods in many large retail chains like Carrefour, Delhaize, Tesco, Metro, Makro, Albert Heijn, Marks & Spencer, Lidl and many more. 

When we say natural, we really mean natural. These treats do not contain artificial flavours or colours, additives, or E numbers.

100% natural ingredients are used. Fresh broccoli, spinach, beets, raisins, berries and carrot are mixed in the dough. For the topping, sesame seeds, linseeds, pumpkin seeds and sunflower seeds are used. For the bird and little animal snacks, dried raisins and berries are used for the toppings.

These products enjoy a shelf life of 20 months. 

The facility in which the baked treats are produced, is incredibly strict in terms of hygiene and safety. Even pallets are not allowed in the production plant.

Diversification is key for Straits Union in 2017. In an effort to expand into new markets, yet, keeping to its fun food concept, the company chanced upon Willem van Kruijsbergen’s Bake4Pets, 

The all-natural and additive-free muffins, cakes and biscuits will be launched in Singapore by the last quarter of 2017, and in Malaysia and Australia by the second quarter of 2018, under the company's private label, Chompétit, by Willie. We are really excited about this new business venture with Willem, and our new newly-appointed distributorship by Bake4Pets, as we are very passionate pet lovers as well! 

Distributors and retailers of Chompétit, by Willie’s range of products will be fully supported with pro-active marketing and branding activities, including print and digital collateral, display shelf units, micro-site content development, social media engagements, media buys, email communications, media and influencers relations and events, as well as corporate social responsibility events.

description: Ah Pau Chop began as a family business handed down from one generation to another while upholding the family motto of ‘The root of Chinese Heritage’. The company has made significant progress since its humble beginnings as a small retail cart selling dried provisions along the Singapore River in the 1950s and along Teo Chew Street in the early 1960s. Ah Pau Chop was officially established as a partnership business in 1976 and transformed itself into a wholesale-cum-retail business model, serving major restaurant chains and the general population, situated at Victoria Street Wholesale Centre in Bugis. Over the decades, Ah Pau Chop continued to serve its customers with dedication and has now become a popular go-to destination for festive goods by Singaporeans during the Lunar New Year festive season. Today, the business has relocated to the Victoria Wholesale Centre in Kallang and continues to garner a strong following by its clientele.

description:

Mycosortia is a pioneering food technology company specializing in upcycling food waste into high-value, plant-based ingredients. Our proprietary microbial biotransformation technology transforms food side streams into FibProt, a sustainable and versatile ingredient with applications in plant-based foods, confectionery, and flavoring. We partner with B2B customers to supply FibProt as a clean-label solution and also develop and market innovative, sustainable food products like plant-based cheese and cocoa-free chocolate-like treats through B2B2C channels. Join us in revolutionizing the food system and creating a more sustainable future.

description:
Hosen Group, or Hock Seng Food, was established in the 1970s and has since grown to become one of Asia’s leading importers, exporters and distributors of fast moving consumer goods (“FMCG”), specialising in packaged foods. The Company adopted the name Hosen Group Ltd when it went public on the Singapore Stock Exchange in September 2004.

Hosen Group, through its wholly-owned subsidiaries in Singapore, Malaysia and China, has developed an extensive and robust distribution network that spans Asia, Europe, Middle East, Africa and the Oceanic countries. Today, Hosen’s brands of products can be found on the various continents of the world.

Our brands are renowned for providing premium quality products at affordable prices. With more than 40 years of experience in brand management and product development, we have won many accolades and bagged numerous awards over the years, including the Most Promising Brand Award, Superbrands Award, and Influential Brand Award, The Company has also been awarded Singapore 1000 Company (Public Listed) for consecutive years.

description:
OUR HISTORY
Cooking Art was birthed in the 1980s as one of Singapore's pioneer professional culinary schools. Under the directives of its Wilton-trained founder, Mrs Esther Kim Sim, Cooking Art soon became one of Singapore’s premium cooking schools. In the mid-90s, Cooking Art entered a new arena to meet rising needs for a first-rate local dessert supplier for Singapore’s hotel industry. Using the wealth of culinary expertise garnered from her acclaimed cooking school days, Cooking Art went behind the scenes and has since grown to serve Singapore’s 5-star hotels and Istana events, with special requests from international delegates to give them the experience of unique Singaporean desserts.

OUR WORK
Through our years of experience, Cooking Art has had the pleasure and privilege of serving Singapore’s top hotels and partnering with Singapore’s best executive and pastry chefs on local and international projects such as overseas Singapore food promotions, local heritage celebrations and in-house events and promotions.

QUALITY ASSURANCE
Specializing in Nonya Kuehs and other local delights, our products are made fresh every day in our 24-hour, year-round ISO22000 kitchens to ensure that our customers always get the freshest of products. Here at Cooking Art, we believe in caring for our customers by caring for theirs too. Our products do not contain any preservatives. It is, and always has been, a pleasure provide our customers with products that offer the best local culinary experiences.

description:
Altimate Nutrition was founded to disrupt the food industry by creating innovative, sustainable products that can help tackle pressing issues like hunger and food insecurity.

At the core of our mission lies a commitment to leveraging insect (cricket) proteins as a tasty, nutritious, and eco-friendly solution. Cricket protein is the sustainable protein of the future, requiring significantly less water, energy, feed, and land while generating lower greenhouse gas emissions.

Beyond its environmental benefits, cricket-based products offer unparalleled nutritional advantages, including enhanced protein quality, a rich profile of micronutrients and essential fatty acids, and a low-calorie density. Notably, cricket farming's low-tech, low-capital requirements open economic opportunities even for underprivileged communities.

Join the revolution and be part of our mission to reshape the future of food.

description:

Transam Industries is now a proud subsidiary of OVOL Singapore Pte Ltd, a reputable leader in the distribution of paper and print media. description:
Love Handle is Asia's first plant-based butcher with the largest curation of plant-based meats, dairy's and condiments. We’re on a mission to deliver flavour that’s good for the planet; or in other words, plant-based deliciousness created to satiate meatlovers. 

Begin your Love Handle journey at our butcher. Divided into 3 sections - Raw, Marinated & Prepared, and Condiments/Non-dairy - we offer an authentic cut, weigh, and package experience just like the butchers you’ve always known. Key highlights include sausage patties & minced chicken, brisket & “beef” wellington, and housemade kombu butter & XO sauce. Have we got your mouth watering yet? Make your way upstairs to get a taste for yourself, where we use our meats to create flavour-packed burgers and mains. The top floor is where all the behind-the-scenes magic happens. Home to our very own innovation hub, the Love Handle team spends hours here experimenting on new ways and recipes to grow the plant-based industry.

Online or in-store, we’re here to bring you food like you’ve never known before, and to be your pal with fun collabs, experiences, and a content hub full of recipes.

description:
A History of Comfort:

Brothers Richard and Donald Rheem founded Rheem Manufacturing Company in Emeryville, CA, in 1925. While the company has produced a number of products in its nearly 100 years of operation, Rheem is currently the only manufacturer in the world that produces heating, cooling, water heating, pool & spa heating and commercial refrigeration products, and it is the largest manufacturer of water heating products in North America.

Award-Winning Innovations:

From industry-leading technologies to next-generation energy efficiencies, Rheem has been a pioneer in developing some of the most innovative advancements in heating, cooling and water heating. With a long list of award-winning solutions, Rheem continues to deliver advanced comfort, savings and experiences to our customers—just as we’ve done for nearly 100 years.

A Trusted Family of Brands:

Both in the US and abroad, innovative products from the Rheem family of brands lead the industries they serve. To maintain our leadership position—regardless of the brand badge affixed to them—our products must always be unique in the marketplace, relevant to our customers’ lifestyles, and authentic to our company’s values.

description:
If you're reading this, you're probably a stressed out working professional. We hope to make your workday or company events more homey by bringing homemade meals to your workplace.

With that, welcome to Hawkr. We're a platform for homemade food delivery based in Singapore and Klang Valley. Imagine a world where you can experience the best Nasi Briyani made by an aunty in your apartment block, or artisan kombucha made by your bro next door, all in one platform. Despite being the bedrock of Singaporean and Malaysian food culture, home businesses don't always get the visibility and support they deserve and we want to change that.

We believe you'll get the best culinary experience in your own neighborhood. We also believe that anybody should be able to start an F&B brand from a simple home kitchen. Above all, we believe homemade food brings communities closer. That's why we started Hawkr. We hope you'll feel right at home here!

-Team Hawkr

description:

DW has aspirations to Transform the Wholesale Trade .

For Niche Brands, here is an opportunity to unleash your potential without expensive marketing and distribution costs .Buyers and Suppliers now have a unique opportunity to disrupt and change the traditional wholesale trade.
DW is an effective online wholesaler that will transform the traditional distribution value proposition with a relentless focus on engaging the supplier and customer while executing the value chain, and energizing the business .

description:
Super Food Ingredients is one of the leading product innovator and manufacturer in Southeast Asia. We work in partnership with multinational F&B manufacturing and food-service companies, as well as hotels, restaurants and cafes ("HORECA") to create tailored products suitable for the F&B industry and markets. Super Food Ingredients aims to be a premier food ingredients specialist, capable of delivering quality and consistent food ingredients to serve the regional marketplace. 

Our core technological strengths in manufacturing non-dairy creamer (NDC), soluble coffee powder, cereal flakes and botanical herbal extracts to our strength in research and development, we’re able to create a diverse range of F&B products for our customers. To ensure that only the best ingredients are selected, stringent quality control occurs at every part of the production process. 

At Super, we work together to create customised solutions for all our customers. We also work closely with our in-house research and development units to inform, advise and collaborate with each customer on how to apply our food ingredients into their new or existing F&B products. Processed under highly controlled environments, our ingredients retain their flavours which have kept our partners satisfied for years.

Innovation, improvement and customisation, this multi-faceted approach enables us to derive the best from our core expertise, selection and manufacturing capabilities.

description:
Dixon Singapore is a premier manufacturer and supplier of material transfer products, across a wide range of markets – mining, oil & gas, industry, marine, fire protection, food & beverage, irrigation and petrochemical.

Dixon is committed to being the easiest company to do business with and has an unsurpassed reputation of producing safe and leak free products for more than 100 years.  Founded by Howard W Goodall in 1916 through visiting construction sites, Howard identified their hose and coupling requirements and started manufacturing purpose-built product solutions.  Headquartered in Chestertown, Maryland in the United States of America, Dixon has grown to be a leading innovator in the hose coupling industry.

With sales and distribution centres in  Singapore, China & Australia, Dixon utilises its application based knowledge and current technologies to create products to solve challenges across a wide range of material transfer applications. 

Dixon Singapore is focused on providing value add services, superior customer service, technical support and training; ensuring its customers can connect with the right parts just at the right time.

description:
The Boralis Group brings together collaborative industry experts with a unique combination of practical domain knowledge, diverse operational experience and deep industry networks, specifically aimed at addressing scaled, sustainable food supply. 

We have two core areas of focus;
1. Food Systems:
Scaling integration of complex (Hyperlocal Intensive Urban and Extensive Regional) sustainable food production bases and supply chains. Includes focus around carbon/water asset footprint, animal welfare, production and processing, food & feed innovation, supply chain digitisation and circular economy/waste. In Singapore this aims to support 30by30 expansion plans in production efficiency and scaling. 

2. Growth Services:
Support for companies scaling NED (novel, enabling and disruptive) solutions in upstream food and feed production (e.g. process innovation, feedstock innovation, novel chemistry, genetics, plant nutrition and water management) and processing that specifically support scaling of Food Systems. Together with M&A partners, we support portfolio strategy, market entry, commercial offtake agreements and securing growth capital with investors.

Our approach combines a balance of strategy and execution - connecting innovators, investors and industry to drive results.  Boots on the ground, sleeves rolled up, hands in the dirt, getting stuff done.

We have offices in Sydney and Singapore.

description:

description:
You Tiao Man transformed from a hawker business into a manufacturing brand, which grew to become one of Singapore's biggest You Tiao manufacturers - serving Hotels, Caterers, Restaurants, Cafes and Hawkers. 

With the goal of making traditional food accessible, You Tiao Man has expanded into B2C markets -supplying directly to consumers online and in over 100 supermarkets island-wide. 

You Tiao Man is Halal-certified, a Tasty Singapore ambassador and was recently one of the 64 recipients to be awarded the Made With Passion brand mark in 2021. Spearheaded by Singapore Tourism Board and Enterprise Singapore, it celebrates brands who embody the Singapore spirit of turning possibilities into reality.

As a strong ambassador of upholding heritage and hawker culture, You Tiao Man reinvents tradition and makes traditional food relevant to young people. Certified with the “Healthier Choice” symbol by Health Promotion Board, Singapore’s first Wholegrain You Tiao is a popular alternative among the young and health conscious Singaporeans. 

You Tiao Man is a well-loved brand that inspires Singaporean and other young people to have the courage to embrace change, display resilience and achieve the “Singapore dream”.

description:
Japanese Sake has been the traditional drink of Japan for centuries. Many have enjoyed this national drink with its popular cuisine for the past decades. Singaporeans are all too familiar with it. However, there are many questions that need to be answered as its popularity grows. The typical questions are - Should I drink my sake hot or cold? How should I store my sake? How do I choose my sake?

Inter Rice Asia Pte Ltd entered the Singapore market in 2008 with the direction to promote sake, and to educate others on how to enjoy this amazing beverage. It imports directly from breweries in Japan, mainly in the Niigata prefecture, which prides itself to be "The Burgundy" region in Japan. Selected brands and types of premium sake are introduced to restaurants and pubs, giving a wider variety of options to the more discerning customers in Singapore. Private collectors of wine are beginning to also show interest in Japanese sake and learning how to enjoy the finer ones. 

Inter Rice Asia aims to educate and promote sake appreciation in Singapore and the nearby region.

description:
Dynamic Foodco’s TnT technology (Taste and Texture) transforms ordinary plant ingredients into sustainable food solution for the masses. The company’s technology
philosophy is not ingredient-centric but consumer-centric — so the ingredients used in the plant-based products are not static.

Singapore-based Dynamic Foodco is a food-technology company working to tackle food security issues in Singapore and beyond. Established in 2021, Dynamic Foodco leverages Dr. Andy Kusumo’s experience as the first scientist and R&D Head in Asia for Quorn, a pioneer in the alternative protein space; his prior stint at biopharma Merck and Amgen; and his chemical engineering degrees from Cornell University and Carnegie Mellon University, to push the boundaries of plant-based meat alternatives.

description:

description:
Nanyang Gum Benjamin (MFG) Pte Ltd has accumulated more than 60 years of experience in the production and quality control of Gum Benjamin. Commonly known as Lobans or Gum Benzoin, this incense product is heavily used during cultural and religious practices by people of different background, with the aim of enhancing positive emotional energy. Nanyang Gum Benjamin believes in sourcing for the most suitable raw materials and processing of other gum products in line with our products. Over the years, we have exported our products to places across Asia, Europe, the Middle East, North Africa, and the Americas. We manufacture different grades of Gum Benjamin, supplying them in bulk packaging, depending on the needs of the buyer. 

We firmly practice the philosophy of customer-orientation, and to support this principle, we have built a trustworthy network with deep product knowledge and strict quality control. Our emphasis on quality standards has, therefore, made us a reputable and long-term supplier for different client groups across different continents, as we ensure that our products meets the requirements of our client and the marketplace. Our flagship brands such as NGB-Cannon and NGB-Eye has achieved significant market presence in the incense industry. 

Nanyang Gum Benjamin has stood the test of time and overcome the challenges of the economy through constant improvement in our manufacturing process. Continuing the legacy of trust and excellence, Nanyang Gum Benjamin resonates with dedication and quality. We are honoured to have trustworthy suppliers and clients working with us. We look forward to exploring new opportunity for collaboration and partnership locally and internationally while upholding our values.

description:
53 Degrees is a brand management company based in Singapore. We provide brand owner representation and full brand management services. Established in 2018, we are the appointed principle of Rong Tai He Maotai in Asia Pacific, Europe, Middle East and Africa. 

Committed to deliver high quality and authentic baijiu to the global market, our mission is to tell the true story of Maotai, its history and culture, one bottle at a time.

OUR STORY

The birth of 53 Degrees came about when a group of creative-minded entrepreneurs from diverse backgrounds in wine & spirits, business development and information technology joined forces in search of authentic baijiu in China. 

Their journey led them to Maotaizhen – home of the world’s most valuable spirit - where they had the honour and privilege to meet the 6th generation descendant and current brand owner of Rong Tai He to discover the true origin of Maotai.

OUR PARTNERSHIPS

Combining the heritage and tradition of baijiu with modern and new age trends, our plan is to increase the global footprint of Rong Tai He outside of China through strategic partnerships in the global travel retail market. 

Focusing mainly on key locations with high Mainland China traveler footfall, Rong Tai He has partnered with top travel retail distributor, Gebr. Heinemann and will be seen on the shelves of duty-free shops across Asia Pacific, Europe and Middle East in 2019.

Plans are already underway to collaborate with local domestic partners across the globe for ground activation and direct consumer experience to introduce cocktail versions of Rong Tai He as well as delectable food-pairing menus.

At 53 Degrees, innovation never stops. Message us at enquiries@rongtaihe.asia for more details.

description:
Shiok Shack is a pop-up burger concept taking over your favourite bars around the city. Popping up monthly, Shiok Shack is here to fill the gap for affordable, delicious and quality gourmet burgers in Singapore. We believe the best burgers are the simplest. Our recipe? Quality meat, the freshest ingredients, sandwiched between toasted warm buns.

Shiok Shack’s menu features The Classic, The Cheeseburger and loaded fries – our take on a Singaporean fast food favourite. Nothing on the menu is above S$18, unless you go for that extra patty which we are pretty sure you will.

Shiok Shack’s chefs paid their dues at the likes of Luke’s, Open Farm Community and Marina Bay Sands and have bagged a wealth of experience.

After their successful launch in September, swing by for an evening of warm burgers, ice cold beers and free hugs at our next hang-out. You can also follow Shiok Shack (@shiokshacksg) on Instagram and Facebook (Facebook.com/shiokshacksg) to keep up with all the action.

description:
Faust Innovations Pte. Ltd. is a Singapore based distribution channel focused on Asia and the Middle East.  Our company was founded by entrepreneurs and business leaders who have had environmental and healthy living concerns at the forefront of their thinking for the past 20 years.

Antimicrobial Technology:
Our business is the distribution of innovative products that can change the landscape of society. Products that offer a solution to the societal challenges that we face without causing harm to the world that future generations will inherit.  Products that ensure healthy living both now and in the future.
The products we distribute contain a patented Antimicrobial Plastic Additive (known as d2p AM) that protects against harmful microbes that thrive on the surface of plastic products and other human contact surfaces.
This Antimicrobial Plastic Additive has been tested and proven to create virus reduction of 99.9% in one hour, and are resistant to various forms of algae, bacteria, fungi (mildew, yeasts and moulds).
The potential uses of d2p includes:  medical face masks, gloves (both household and hospital use—nitrile, latex), plastic food containers, plastic food wrap, hospital gowns, shoe boots, hair caps, etc.

OXO Biodegradable Technology:
Certain of the products that we distribute are treated with the additive d2w, which is an oxo biodegradable additive included in the masterbatch production process of plastics manufacturing.  This masterbatch turns ordinary plastic, at the end of its useful life, into a material that readily degrades in the presence of oxygen and sunlight (UV light).
This material degrades in a continuous process that leaves no harmful residue, only carbon dioxide, water and biomass.The potential uses of d2p includes:  medical face masks, gloves (both household and hospital use), plastic food containers, plastic food wrap, hospital gowns, shoe boots, hair caps, etc. Our d2w treated products include face masks, gloves, food packaging products.

description:
Yum Stevia: Pioneering the New Age of Natural Sugar Alternatives

It took us only 20 years but we have bred our own variety of Stevia which combined with our unique cold-processing plant, gave us a variety of Stevia that has no bitter aftertaste! - in essence what that means is that we have created the world's closest natural alternative to sugar replacement. The result? A sweetener that mirrors the sensory experience of natural sugar like never before.

Our current B2B Offerings:
Beyond just a sweetener, we've unveiled Stevia's potential as a versatile ingredient, venturing into the realms of cosmetics, honey substitutes, and even the animal feed sector.

 Food & Beverage:
1. Yum Stevia: Seamlessly replace or reduce sugar in food and beverage items, preserving the authentic flavor profile.
2. YsxHoney Stevia: A harmonious blend of Stevia and Honey designed to substitute or reduce honey content in products.

 Cosmetics:
3. YsxPhyto Stevia: Our patent-pending Stevia extract reimagines skincare with its anti-wrinkle, anti-aging, acne-reducing, and weight management benefits. An eco-friendly alternative to retinol and chemical antioxidants, it's safe for daytime application.

 Feed & Fertilizer:
4. YSxFeed (Chicken & Cow): Enhance livestock well-being with our Stevia blend, proven to boost milk production in cows and egg yield in chickens.
5. YSxCrop Supplement: Fortify crops with our Stevia infusion, offering a spectrum of micro-nutrients tailored to individual crop varieties for optimal health and growth.

Discover the transformative potential of Stevia with Yum Stevia. For collaborations or inquiries, don't hesitate to connect with us. Embark on your product innovation journey with Stevia as your cornerstone.

description:
Lubricating the Future Responsibly.

Start First Pte Ltd is a Singapore-based global manufacturer of high-performance lubricants and grease, serving critical industries including Automotive, Heavy Duty, Marine, Mining, Construction, Industrial, Agriculture, Shipping Ports, and more.

Since 2014, our flagship brand EERSTA Lubricants has powered vehicle fleets and machinery with trusted reliability and efficiency. Today, we’re driving the future of lubrication—engineering solutions that reduce emissions, extend equipment life, and support a circular economy.

We are proud to be an appointed distributor for BASF Fuel and Lubricant Solutions, further strengthening our commitment to delivering world-class, sustainable technologies to our customers.

We believe that sustainability and performance go hand in hand. Our mission is to deliver eco-conscious lubrication technologies that help industries operate cleaner, longer, and smarter. Whether you're moving people, powering infrastructure, or cultivating land, Start First is your partner in progress.

 Vision: To be the global benchmark in sustainable lubrication, powering cleaner, longer-lasting operations across mobility and industry.

 Mission: We deliver high-performance, eco-conscious lubrication solutions that enhance efficiency, reduce environmental impact, and support the evolving needs of automotive, marine, industrial, and heavy-duty sectors worldwide.

Let’s build a future where performance meets responsibility.
 Headquartered in Singapore |  Serving Global Markets
 www.startfirst.sg |  admin@startfirst.sg

Contact us to collaborate

description:
We've always had a special bond over our love for amazing food. Whether it was devouring mouthwatering dishes at family gatherings or exploring the vibrant food markets together, we believe in the power of fresh, wholesome ingredients and their ability to bring joy and nourishment to our lives.

We're not your average grocery store founders. We're just two regular people, driven by our passion for eating and sharing the goodness of fresh produce. When we embarked on this adventure, we wanted to create something truly special - a place where anyone, regardless of their background or circumstances, could have access to delicious and nutritious fruits, vegetables, and eggs.

We make sure that every item is hand-picked with love and care. We understand that not everyone can afford organic options, but that shouldn't mean compromising on quality. We've made it our mission to ensure that every piece of produce that reaches your doorstep is of the highest standard and bursting with flavor.

But our journey doesn't end there. One of the core values that drives us is compassion. We strongly believe in giving back to the community that has supported us on this amazing ride. That's why we offer free delivery to the sick, elderly, and disabled individuals in Singapore. We want to make sure that no one is left behind when it comes to accessing fresh and nutritious food. It's our small way of spreading love and nourishment to those who need it most.


Picture this: A grandmother unable to leave her home due to mobility issues, longing for the taste of a juicy, ripe mango. Or a young student recovering from an illness, yearning for a colorful array of vibrant veggies to regain strength. These stories, these real-life moments, are what fuel our passion to keep doing what we do.

We may be an online grocery store, but we're also your friends and neighbors. We want to be a part of your food journey, helping you make delici
